clinical_blockers: Laterality, eyelid eversion, irrigation, foreign-body removal, broad supportive care, fixed same-day or 24-hour follow-up, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
The workflow must not infer a retained foreign body, abrasion, keratitis, chemical injury, or penetrating injury or generate drops, antibiotics, irrigation, removal, or referral advice.
